description: Mappings from PostureIQ evidence types to ISO 27001 Annex A controls

controls.title: Access control
controls.rationale: Access control ensures only authorized individuals access information assets.
controls.recommendation: Implement RBAC and Conditional Access policies to enforce access control.

controls.title: Identity management
controls.rationale: Proper identity management ensures unique identification and accountability.
controls.recommendation: Maintain centralized identity management through Microsoft Entra ID.

controls.title: Authentication information
controls.rationale: Strong authentication prevents unauthorized access to systems and data.
controls.recommendation: Enforce MFA and implement strong credential policies.

controls.title: Access rights
controls.rationale: Access rights must follow the principle of least privilege.
controls.recommendation: Review role assignments regularly and minimize privileged access.

controls.title: User endpoint devices
controls.rationale: Endpoint device management ensures secure access from trusted devices.
controls.recommendation: Implement Conditional Access policies requiring compliant devices.

controls.title: Configuration management
controls.rationale: Configuration management ensures systems are deployed and maintained securely.
controls.recommendation: Use Azure Policy to enforce and audit configuration baselines.

controls.title: Logging
controls.rationale: Logging provides audit trails for security monitoring and incident investigation.
controls.recommendation: Enable diagnostic settings on all resources to ensure comprehensive logging.

controls.title: Monitoring activities
controls.rationale: Monitoring enables detection of anomalous behavior and security incidents.
controls.recommendation: Configure Azure Monitor alerts and review activity logs regularly.

controls.title: Networks security
controls.rationale: Network security controls protect information in transit and at rest.
controls.recommendation: Implement network segmentation, NSGs, and firewall rules.

controls.title: Use of cryptography
controls.rationale: Cryptography protects the confidentiality and integrity of information.
controls.recommendation: Ensure encryption is enabled for data at rest and in transit.

controls.title: Secure authentication - MFA Registration Coverage
controls.rationale: Multi-factor authentication must be enforced for all users.
controls.recommendation: Enforce MFA registration. Target 90%+ registration rate.

controls.title: Monitoring activities - Risky User Detection
controls.rationale: Identity-based threats must be detected and responded to promptly.
controls.recommendation: Enable Identity Protection. Remediate high-risk users.

controls.title: Information security in supplier relationships - Cross-Tenant
controls.rationale: Cross-tenant access must be controlled to protect organizational data.
controls.recommendation: Configure cross-tenant MFA trust. Restrict B2B collaboration.

controls.title: Compliance with policies, rules and standards
controls.rationale: Policy compliance must be continuously monitored.
controls.recommendation: Remediate non-compliant resources. Target 80%+ compliance.

controls.title: Capacity management - Defender Plans
controls.rationale: Security monitoring must cover all critical workloads.
controls.recommendation: Enable all Defender plans. Configure auto-provisioning and contacts.

controls.title: Privileged access rights - PIM Configuration
controls.rationale: Privileged access must be time-limited and require strong authentication.
controls.recommendation: Require MFA and justification for PIM. Limit activation to 8 hours.

controls.title: Access rights - Access Reviews
controls.rationale: Access rights must be reviewed periodically.
controls.recommendation: Configure recurring access reviews for privileged roles.

controls.title: Management of technical vulnerabilities - VM Security
controls.rationale: VMs must be hardened with encryption, identity, and security agents.
controls.recommendation: Enable disk encryption, managed identity, and MDE extension.

controls.title: Configuration management - Web App Security
controls.rationale: Web apps must enforce secure configuration defaults.
controls.recommendation: Enable HTTPS, TLS 1.2+, disable FTP and remote debugging.

controls.title: Information deletion - SQL Security
controls.rationale: Database security must include authentication, encryption, and auditing.
controls.recommendation: Configure Azure AD admin, auditing, TDE, and restrict public access.

controls.title: Security of network services - AKS Security
controls.rationale: Container platforms must enforce access control and network segmentation.
controls.recommendation: Enable RBAC, AAD, network policy, and Defender for Containers.

controls.title: Segregation of networks - Firewall Protection
controls.rationale: Firewalls must enforce network segregation with threat intelligence.
controls.recommendation: Enable threat intelligence. Configure rule collections.

controls.title: Web filtering - Route and Flow Log Security
controls.rationale: Network routes and flow logs must be properly configured for security.
controls.recommendation: Configure controlled routing and enable NSG flow logs.

controls.title: Secure development life cycle - Monitoring Coverage
controls.rationale: Centralized monitoring must cover all critical resources.
controls.recommendation: Configure Log Analytics, alert rules, and action groups.

controls.title: AI Services Security
controls.rationale: AI accounts must enforce network isolation and disable local auth.
controls.recommendation: Disable public access, disable local auth, enable CMK on AI accounts.

controls.title: Resource Group Asset Classification
controls.rationale: Resource groups must be tagged for asset inventory and classification.
controls.recommendation: Apply mandatory tags to all resource groups.

controls.title: AI Deployment Governance
controls.rationale: AI deployments must have content filtering and rate limits.
controls.recommendation: Configure content filter policies and rate limits on AI deployments.

controls.title: ML Workspace Network Segregation
controls.rationale: ML workspaces must use private endpoints for network segregation.
controls.recommendation: Disable public network access. Configure private endpoints.

controls.title: Storage Account Information Deletion and Protection
controls.rationale: Storage accounts must enforce encryption, soft delete, and network isolation.
controls.recommendation: Enable HTTPS-only, soft delete, TLS 1.2, and configure firewall.

controls.title: Container Registry Secure Architecture
controls.rationale: Container registries must disable admin access and enable content trust.
controls.recommendation: Disable admin user. Enable content trust. Use private endpoints.

controls.title: Container App Web Filtering
controls.rationale: Container Apps must enforce secure ingress.
controls.recommendation: Disable insecure connections. Enable managed identity.

controls.title: Cosmos DB Data Masking and Protection
controls.rationale: Cosmos DB must disable local auth, use CMK, and enforce network isolation.
controls.recommendation: Disable local auth. Enable CMK. Use private endpoints.

controls.title: Database Server Data Leakage Prevention
controls.rationale: Database servers must disable public access and enable HA and geo-redundant backup.
controls.recommendation: Disable public access. Enable HA. Enable geo-redundant backup.

controls.title: Application Gateway Secure Coding Verification
controls.rationale: Application Gateways must enable WAF in Prevention mode.
controls.recommendation: Enable WAF. Set Prevention mode. Configure TLS 1.2.

controls.title: API Management Cryptography Controls
controls.rationale: APIM must disable legacy TLS/SSL and use VNet integration.
controls.recommendation: Disable TLS 1.0/1.1. Configure VNet. Enable managed identity.

controls.title: Storage Container Information Access Restriction
controls.rationale: Storage containers must not allow anonymous public access.
controls.recommendation: Set container access to Private. Configure lifecycle and immutability policies.

controls.title: SQL Server Monitoring Activities
controls.rationale: SQL Servers must enable ATP and per-database auditing.
controls.recommendation: Enable ATP and vulnerability assessment. Verify per-database auditing.

controls.title: Web Application Privileged Access Rights
controls.rationale: Web Apps must enable authentication and restrict access.
controls.recommendation: Enable App Service Auth. Restrict CORS. Configure IP restrictions.

controls.title: Database Server Logging and Monitoring
controls.rationale: Database servers must enforce secure transport and audit logging.
controls.recommendation: Enable require_secure_transport. Enable log_checkpoints and audit logging.

controls.title: Container Registry Security Testing
controls.rationale: ACR repositories must enforce tag immutability and clean up stale images.
controls.recommendation: Enable tag immutability. Remove stale repositories.

controls.title: Information Security Incident Management Planning
controls.rationale: ISO 27001 requires planning and preparation for managing security incidents.
controls.recommendation: Enable Defender and configure alert rules for incident detection.

controls.title: Assessment and Decision on Information Security Events
controls.rationale: Security events must be assessed and escalated through alert infrastructure.
controls.recommendation: Configure action groups with multiple notification receivers.

controls.title: Response to Information Security Incidents
controls.rationale: Security contacts must be designated for incident response coordination.
controls.recommendation: Configure security contacts with email and alert notifications.

controls.title: Learning from Information Security Incidents
controls.rationale: Investigation capability is essential for learning from incidents.
controls.recommendation: Deploy Log Analytics and configure diagnostic settings.

controls.title: Change Management
controls.rationale: ISO 27001 requires formal change management processes.
controls.recommendation: Assign policies with deny effects to control unauthorized changes.

controls.title: Configuration Change Tracking
controls.rationale: Configuration changes must be logged and monitored.
controls.recommendation: Ensure activity logs capture Write, Delete, and Action events.

controls.title: ICT Readiness for Business Continuity
controls.rationale: ISO 27001 requires ICT continuity planning including backup.
controls.recommendation: Deploy Recovery Services vaults with soft delete.

controls.title: ICT Redundancy
controls.rationale: ICT facilities must have sufficient redundancy.
controls.recommendation: Use geo-redundant storage replication.

controls.title: Inventory of Information and Associated Assets
controls.rationale: ISO 27001 requires identification and inventory of information assets.
controls.recommendation: Maintain a comprehensive resource inventory.

controls.title: Classification of Information
controls.rationale: Information must be classified according to organizational needs.
controls.recommendation: Apply data classification tags to all resources.

controls.title: Information Security Awareness and Training
controls.rationale: ISO 27001 requires security awareness training for personnel.
controls.recommendation: Configure Terms of Use and enforce policy acknowledgement.
